title: Atlantis
summary: The war that ended the golden age — Atlantis versus Agartha's Kingdom of Rama, and the Fall that shrank humanity.
markdown:
**Atlantis**, in the archive's telling, is not merely a lost city — it is one side of the war
that ended Earth's golden age. The September 4, 2020 session, delivered by a guardian being
called **Asha** of the "Asha Dimension Heavenly Lineage," gives the fullest account.

Before the Fall — the session places it around **15,300 BC** — Earth was engineered paradise: a
controlled tropical world, 70–80°F everywhere, without storms, sheltered under a **two-layer
ice shield** and threaded with the pyramid and ley-line grids built by the ancient lineages
(the archive credits the [Avian race](/lore/avian-race/) among the builders). Its people were
**giant light-beings** — the tall generations of the [Anunnaki](/lore/anunnaki/) inheritance.

Then the **Atlantis–Egyptian empire went to war with the Agartha Kingdom of Rama**, fighting
with space fleets. The grid network shattered; the ice shield collapsed; cosmic radiation
poured in — and it **mutated human DNA, severed the light body, and shrank humanity to a tenth
of its size**, cutting lifespan and mind with it. This is the Fall the archive returns to
everywhere: the reason abilities are dormant, the reason the
[Rainbow Light Body](/lore/rainbow-light-body/) must be *restored* rather than invented.

The interview sessions preserve a second account of the end: one of Earth's **two moons
falling onto the continent** — after which *"90% of the population exoded to the star systems
[Zeta 1 and Zeta 2](/lore/greys-zeta/),"* the military remnant withdrawing to North America
and Asia. They add texture to the empire itself: Atlantean **ships of living granite**, flown
by pilots who merged their molecular bodies with the stone. Two tellings — war or moonfall —
one Fall; the archive keeps both as spoken.

Asha's lineage, the session says, is decreed to guide that restoration — humanity back to
giant light-body form, the world back to garden. The April 2020 material adds a coda: old
Atlantis fell in northeast Africa, and the United States, in the sessions' phrase, is the
**"New Atlantis"** — the empire's echo, replaying its choices. Alongside
[Lemuria](/lore/lemuria/) and [Agartha](/lore/agartha/), Atlantis anchors the third epoch of
the [chronicle](/lore/the-chronicle/): the golden age, and how it was lost.
